records.description: Macquarie staff are encouraged to use Microsoft Copilot Chat with their university account for AI work, and required to do so for work involving sensitive information.
records.howToObtain: Log into Microsoft Copilot Chat with a Macquarie University account.
records.costToUser: Not specified by the public source.

evidence.sourceTitle: Microsoft Copilot Chat - Macquarie University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Staff looking to utilise AI tools are encouraged to log into Microsoft Copilot Chat with your University account, and are required to do so for work that includes employee, student, health or critical or sensitive information.

evidence.sourceTitle: Microsoft Copilot Chat - Macquarie University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Copilot Chat is a powerful AI solution running on our infrastructure using one of the latest language learning models (GPT-4o). Copilot Chat adheres to strict privacy standards.

records.description: Macquarie relays the Australian Government PSPF Direction banning DeepSeek products for projects receiving Commonwealth, State or Territory government funding.
records.howToObtain: Not available for affected government-funded projects; applicable staff are asked to remove DeepSeek products.
records.costToUser: Not applicable.

evidence.sourceTitle: Microsoft Copilot Chat - Macquarie University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Any projects receiving Commonwealth, State or Territory government funding are banned from using DeepSeek. Applicable staff are asked to remove DeepSeek products, applications and web services.

records.description: EUR describes Erudite as a secure AI tool with ChatGPT-like functionality in a privacy-protected environment.
records.howToObtain: Use the EUR-supported Erudite environment referenced by the university's teacher-support resources.
records.costToUser: Not specified by the public source.

evidence.sourceTitle: Supporting teachers in using AI - Erasmus University Rotterdam
evidence.evidenceSnippet: At EUR, educators and students work with Erudite, a secure AI tool that offers similar functionalities to ChatGPT but operates within a privacy-protected environment.

records.universityName: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
records.description: UNC lists Microsoft Copilot as a general-use AI tool and ITS documents Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat with data protection.
records.howToObtain: Access Copilot directly or through Microsoft Bing, signing in with a UNC Onyen account.
records.costToUser: Basic license available to anyone with an Onyen; some users have a paid premium license.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools at UNC
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Microsoft Copilot is listed as an AI assistant integrated into Microsoft 365 apps, available to anyone with an onyen for Tier 1 and Tier 2 data.

evidence.sourceTitle: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat (with Data Protection) - UNC ITS
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat (with Data Protection) is available to anyone with an Onyen. Everyone at UNC has the Copilot Chat basic license.

records.universityName: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
records.description: UNC lists Adobe Firefly for image generation and image editing through the UNC Creative Cloud subscription.
records.howToObtain: Access through the UNC Creative Cloud subscription.
records.costToUser: Students and instructional faculty/staff: free; non-instructional faculty/staff: $25/year.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools at UNC
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Adobe Firefly is listed for generating images and text effects, accessible through the UNC Creative Cloud subscription; students and instructional faculty and staff are free, non-instructional faculty and staff are $25/year.

records.universityName: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
records.description: UNC lists PromptLab as secure access to advanced LLMs from multiple leading service providers.
records.howToObtain: Use PromptLab with a UNC Onyen.
records.costToUser: Not specified by the public source.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Tools at UNC
evidence.evidenceSnippet: PromptLab is listed as secure access to advanced large language models from multiple leading service providers, available to anyone with an onyen for Tier 0 and Tier 1 data.

records.description: Texas A&M's secure university-approved AI chat platform for GPT, Claude Sonnet, Gemini, and other models.
records.howToObtain: Log in at tamu.ai with a Texas A&M NetID and password.
records.costToUser: Campus members receive a limited number of free tokens each day; additional tokens may be purchasable later.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Services - Texas A&M Technology Services
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Open to all Texas A&M students and employees, TAMU AI Chat provides staff, faculty, researchers, and students with a secure, university-approved platform to access OpenAI's GPT, Anthropic's Claude Sonnet, and Google's Gemini.

evidence.sourceTitle: TAMU AI Chat (BETA) - Texas A&M Technology Services
evidence.evidenceSnippet: To use TAMU AI Chat, log in with your NetID and password at tamu.ai. You must be a Texas A&M employee or student to use the platform.

records.description: A secure Microsoft Copilot Chat service with data protection for Texas A&M students and employees.
records.howToObtain: Sign in to Copilot Chat with a Texas A&M NetID and password.
records.costToUser: No additional cost to eligible Texas A&M community members with a Microsoft A5 license.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Services - Texas A&M Technology Services
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Free AI tools provided by the University to all students, faculty, and staff include Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat.

evidence.sourceTitle: Copilot Chat - Texas A&M Technology Services
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Copilot Chat is available at no additional cost to Texas A&M community members with a Microsoft A5 license, including TAMU, TAMU-Galveston, and Texas A&M Health.

records.description: Google Gemini with data protection is an AI chatbot designed around search and supports more natural language queries. When logged in with your Texas A&M account, the data protection is activated.
records.howToObtain: Log in to Gemini with a Texas A&M account.
records.costToUser: Free AI tool provided by the University.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI Services - Texas A&M Technology Services
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Google Gemini with data protection is an AI chatbot designed around search and supports more natural language queries. When logged in with your Texas A&M account, the data protection is activated.

records.description: NotebookLM is an AI-powered tool that helps you research, write and organize information. To ensure data is protected, you must log in with your NetID and password.

records.costToUser: Free AI tool provided by the University.

records.description: TU Berlin's Faculty VII one-year pilot project for licensed ChatGPT Edu.
records.howToObtain: Pilot licenses are distributed to Faculty VII researchers, lecturers, staff, and students; course and project resources are hosted on ISIS.
records.costToUser: Not specified by the public source.

evidence.sourceTitle: Pilot project ChatGPT Edu - TU Berlin
evidence.evidenceSnippet: TU Berlin is among the first universities in Germany to have licensed ChatGPT Edu. As a pilot project, ChatGPT Edu will be tested at Faculty VII for one year.

evidence.sourceTitle: Pilot project ChatGPT Edu - TU Berlin
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The pilot project includes 300 ChatGPT Edu licenses, which are distributed to researchers, lecturers, technical/service/administrative staff, and students of Faculty VII.
